CurrentIssues.ID: FunctionNaming:PomodoroCompleteScreen.kt$@Composable fun PomodoroCompleteScreen( uiState: PomodoroCompletionUiState, onStartAnotherSession: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:PomodoroCompleteScreen.kt$@Composable private fun CompletionHeader(totalCycles: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)
FunctionNaming:PomodoroCompleteScreen.kt$@Composable private fun CompletionStatRow(label: String, value: String)
FunctionNaming:PomodoroCompleteScreen.kt$@Composable private fun CompletionStatsCard(uiState: PomodoroCompletionUiState, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)
FunctionNaming:PomodoroSessionHeaderSection.kt$@Composable fun PomodoroSessionHeaderSection(timerType: TimerTypeUi, cycleNumber: Int, totalCycle: Int)

FunctionNaming:PomodoroSessionScreen.kt$@Composable private fun FocusCircularButton( onClick: () -> Unit, icon: @Composable () -> Unit, buttonDescription: String, containerColor: Color, contentColor: Color, )
FunctionNaming:PomodoroSessionScreen.kt$@Composable private fun FocusConfirmDialog(onConfirmFinish: () -> Unit, onDismiss: () -> Unit)
FunctionNaming:PomodoroSessionScreen.kt$@Composable private fun FocusControls( isTimerRunning: Boolean, onTogglePause: () -> Unit = {}, onEnd: () -> Unit = {}, )
FunctionNaming:PomodoroSessionScreen.kt$@Composable private fun FocusQuoteBlock(modifier: Modifier, quote: QuoteContent)

FunctionNaming:PomodoroSessionScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalComposeUiApi::class) @Suppress("NonSkippableComposable") @Composable fun PomodoroSessionScreen( onSessionCompleted: (PomodoroCompletionUiState) -> Unit, viewModel: PomodoroSessionViewModel = koinViewModel(), )
LongMethod:PomodoroCompleteScreen.kt$@Composable fun PomodoroCompleteScreen( uiState: PomodoroCompletionUiState, onStartAnotherSession: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
LongMethod:PomodoroSessionViewModelTest.kt$PomodoroSessionViewModelTest$@Test fun `restoring session fast forwards overdue segments`()
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "A hero is not the one who never falls. He’s the one who gets up again and again, never losing sight of his dreams."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "A lesson without pain is meaningless. That’s because you can’t gain something without sacrificing something in return."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "Believe in yourself. Not in the me that believes in you. Believe in the you that believes in yourself!"
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "Fear is not evil. It tells you what your weakness is. And once you know your weakness, you can become stronger as well as kinder."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "Go forward. No matter how devastated you may be by your own weakness or by the things that happen in your life."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "I don’t want to conquer anything. I just think the guy with the most freedom in this whole ocean… is the Pirate King!"
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "If I don’t wield the sword, I can’t protect you. If I keep wielding the sword, I can’t embrace you."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "The difference between the novice and the master is that the master has failed more times than the novice has tried."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "The night is darkest just before dawn. But keep your eyes open, the best sunrise comes after the longest nights."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "When people are protecting something truly special to them, they truly can become as strong as they can be."
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "When you have to save someone, they’re usually in a scary situation. You must be ready to face fear head-on!"
MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "Whether you have the body, ability, or talent, none of it matters if you don’t believe in yourself."

MaxLineLength:StaticQuoteRepository.kt$StaticQuoteRepository$text = "You should enjoy the little detours. To the fullest. Because that’s where you’ll find the things more important than what you want."
